name.namePart: Institute of History and Philology, Academia Sinica
中央研究院歷史語言研究所

mads.note: Holds one of the largest rubbing collections in the world (史語所藏拓片資料庫): c. 40,000 stone and bronze rubbings spanning Han to Qing, with a searchable database and per-object metadata. A principal comparand for the Stone Sutras rubbings work.
